name: Claude Marketplace
tagline: Helping companies easily get the AI tools they need
description: Use your existing Anthropic commitment to pay for Claude-powered solutions from our customers. Now in limited preview.

name: Vibe Marketplace by Greta
tagline: Sell what you ship, instantly
description: The biggest launch in history of Vibe Coding is here with Vibe Economy. Vibe Marketplace by Greta is a place where you can create, sell and earn endlessly as a side hustle. Create websites, apps, or UI components without writing a single line of code with Greta, publish them to the marketplace, and earn money when others buy and reuse your work. You can also purchase ready-made products to launch faster without building from scratch.

name: GetMimic
tagline: Generate viral social & chat mockups in seconds with AI.
description: Stop wrestling with Photoshop to make marketing assets. GetMimic is an AI-powered engine for generating hyper-realistic, watermark-free chat, post, and AI prompt mockups in seconds. We support 35+ pixel-perfect platforms (WhatsApp, Twitter, ChatGPT). What makes us different? Built-in AI auto-complete to write the conversations for you, real-time light/dark mode previews, and cloud saving—all in a 100% ad-free workspace.

name: Pulldog
tagline: A Mac application to keep your code reviews organized!
description: Pulldog is a native macOS client for reviewing Github & Gitlab pull requests. Aggregate multiple accounts into one seamless inbox. Create smart queries to cut through PR noise. Review with Spotlight actions, Widgets, and on-device Apple Intelligence. No browser tabs — just focused, macOS-native code reviews. 🐶

name: Song Sweeper
tagline: Remove duplicate songs
description: Song Sweeper is a first-of-its-kind iPhone app for cleaning up messy Apple Music libraries. Find duplicate songs across different albums, unify album editions, surface songs you no longer listen to so you can remove them, and favorite your most-played tracks to improve recommendations.

name: MarketingDB
tagline: Free dofollow backlinks for the next generation of SaaS.
description: Why we built this Most directories charge $100+ for a single backlink or hide “dofollow” behind a paywall. That sucks if you're just starting out. We built MarketingDB because we needed free backlinks for our own projects. Now we're sharing that with other builders. Built by makers, for makers We know how hard it is to get noticed. Every project gets the same treatment — a real dofollow backlink, genuine review, and permanent listing.

name: Soloron
tagline: Build real apps by simply describing them.
description: Soloron turns your ideas into real applications. Just describe what you want and AI builds and updates your app.

name: FinishDSA
tagline: Finish DSA with structure, consistency, and zero overwhelm.
description: FinishDSA helps students master Data Structures & Algorithms with structured practice, curated problems, and a clear roadmap to crack coding interviews.

name: DossierPrêt
tagline: Analyze your mortgage file before the bank does
description: Analyze your mortgage file before the bank does. Detect rejection risks, improve approval chances, and gain a clear financial diagnostic.

name: Unenhanced
tagline: Take photos without iPhone auto-enhance
description: Unenhanced is a simple camera app for people who prefer photos without the processed look. It reduces the look of extra sharpening, increased contrast, and color adjustments that can come with your default camera to capture a more natural, true-to-life image. Your photos will match what you see in the camera preview.

name: EverFeatured
tagline: Best Products Deserve A Spotlight
description: EverFeatured highlights the best products from around the world through thoughtfully written articles. Discover tools and ideas that truly deserve a spotlight.

name: Motionsites
tagline: Your Design AI Superpowers In One Click
description: World's Best AI prompts for stunning animated websites in minutes

name: PaperVault.xyz
tagline: Store secrets on encrypted paper with m-of-n keys.
description: PaperVault is a 100% offline vault for your most important digital secrets, including crypto keys, passwords, and recovery codes. It creates encrypted backups you store as printed keys, distributed across trusted people or locations. No cloud, no custodians, no single point of failure. Designed for social recovery and digital inheritance.

name: FDA Data MCP
tagline: Clean FDA datasets in one API for AI agents and developers
description: FDA Data MCP gives AI agents clean, structured access to FDA datasets through one unified interface. Instead of scraping dozens of messy FDA endpoints, developers can query facilities, recalls, inspections, and companies using 33 ready-to-use tools. Built for AI agents, sales, research apps, and healthcare builders who need regulatory data fast.

name: Mad Snake Game
tagline: A fast-paced arcade Snake game for iOS with modern twists.
description: Mad Snake is a fast-paced arcade snake game for iOS. Slither, grow, and compete for the highest score in this addictive mobile gaming experience.

name: HotelPriceTrack
tagline: Forward your hotel reservation. Rebook it cheaper.
description: Forward your hotel reservation email to HotelPriceTrack and we’ll monitor the price for you. If the same room becomes cheaper, we’ll alert you and show you exactly how to rebook it for less. No searching, no manual checking - just automatic alerts so you never overpay for a hotel again.

name: Remote First Jobs
tagline: Find remote-first roles from companies worldwide
description: Remote First Jobs is a job search platform that finds job openings directly on company career pages and picks them up right after they are published. You can filter by role, tech stack, seniority, category, and other practical criteria, which helps you quickly narrow the list to jobs that fit you.

name: Lazy Agent
tagline: A lazy TUI for monitoring Claude Code agent sessions
description: A lazy TUI for monitoring Claude Code agent sessions - illegalstudio/lazyagent

name: Velxio
tagline: Arduino emulator running entirely in the browser
description: It allows you to write Arduino sketches, compile them using arduino-cli, and simulate circuits with a real AVR8 CPU emulator and interactive electronic components. The platform supports multiple boards including Arduino Uno, Nano, Mega, and Raspberry Pi Pico, with peripherals such as GPIO, SPI, I2C, UART, and ADC mapped to visual components. The goal of the project is to create an open-source environment where developers and makers can experiment with Arduino circuits

name: OSS AI Hub
tagline: AI search for 1000+ Open-Source AI Tools
description: OSS AI Hub is the Public-First Directory for Open-Source AI Tools. No login walls. Key Features: • Natural Language AI Search that Works • Side-by-side Comparison Tool • Verified Use Badges from Real Deployments • One-click GitHub Submissions with Auto-Fetch • Live Stars Tracking & amp; velocity • Real Community Reviews Free to browse Forever. Premium unlocks featured placement, priority review & advanced analytics. Already 1000+ Tools and Growing. Try it now: https://www.ossaihub.com
